adjustment.reason_zh: cycles 扣分命中的两个强连通分量均为 scripts/lib/yaml.mjs 递归下降解析器的互递归（parseBlock↔parseMapping↔parseSequence、parseScalar↔parseFlowMap↔parseFlowSeq），属领域固有结构而非失控耦合
adjustment.reason_en: Both SCCs behind the cycles penalty are mutual recursion in the scripts/lib/yaml.mjs recursive-descent parser (parseBlock/parseMapping/parseSequence and parseScalar/parseFlowMap/parseFlowSeq) — domain-normal structure, not runaway coupling

layers.name: CLI & Orchestration
layers.summary: Subcommand dispatch and the top-level drivers behind analyze / serve / run / plan / merge / score.

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: Phase 1 主驱动：遍历项目源码、逐文件调度语言提取器，运行 TS/JS 导入解析子阶段，再建图、分层并写出 raw_structure.json 与解析审计。
classes.description_en: The Phase-1 driver: walks the project, dispatches each file to a language extractor, runs the TS/JS import-resolution sub-phase, then builds the graph, assigns layers, and writes raw_structure.json plus the resolution audit.

classes.name: plan
classes.signature: function plan(root, prev, architectureExists, currentVersion = null, maxChangeRatio = DEFAULT_MAX_CHANGE_RATIO)

classes.name: merge
classes.description_zh: 将上一次 Phase 2 的标注（描述、标签、分层）合并到新鲜的 Phase 1 结构上，仅标记需重新描述的陈旧声明。
classes.description_en: Merges prior Phase-2 annotations (descriptions, tags, layer placement) onto a fresh Phase-1 structure, flagging only the stale declarations that need re-describing.

classes.name: planMain
classes.description_zh: plan 子命令的 CLI 入口：对比 git 状态与上次构建（含插件版本变更强制全量），把全量/增量决策写入 incremental.json。
classes.description_en: CLI entry for the plan subcommand: compares git state against the last build (a plugin-version change forces full) and writes the full-vs-incremental decision to incremental.json.

classes.name: mergeMain
classes.description_zh: merge 子命令的 CLI 入口：读取 raw / prev / incremental，产出 code-map.draft.json 并报告剩余的 Phase 2 工作量。
classes.description_en: CLI entry for the merge subcommand: reads raw/prev/incremental inputs, emits code-map.draft.json, and reports how much Phase-2 work remains.

classes.name: runMain
classes.description_zh: /code-map:run 的驱动：复用存活的服务器，否则以分离进程启动 serve、等待就绪状态文件后打开浏览器。
classes.description_en: Driver behind /code-map:run: reuses a live server if present, otherwise spawns serve detached, waits for the readiness state file, and opens the browser.

classes.name: stopMain
classes.description_zh: /code-map:stop 的驱动：读取 server.json，向服务器进程发送 SIGTERM 并清理过期状态。
classes.description_en: Driver behind /code-map:stop: reads server.json, SIGTERMs the server process, and clears stale state.

classes.name: runServer
classes.description_zh: 启动本地静态服务器：托管 viewer/ 资源、每次请求实时重读 code-map.json，并在端口绑定瞬间写入 server.json。
classes.description_en: Starts the local static server: serves viewer/ assets, re-reads code-map.json on every request, and writes server.json the instant the port binds.

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: `code-map score` 子命令入口：计算并打印/写回 project.score，并校验有界的 AI 调整参数。
classes.description_en: Entry for the `code-map score` subcommand: computes and prints/stamps project.score, validating the bounded AI adjustment flags.

layers.name: Flow Discovery
layers.summary: Forward call/dispatch chains traced from entry points and polymorphic dispatch interfaces.

classes.name: shortName
classes.description_zh: 把 supertype/引用字符串归一化为短名（剥泛型与调用括号、取末段），镜像 core.resolve 的规则。
classes.description_en: Normalizes a supertype/ref string to its short name (strip generics and call parens, take the last segment), mirroring core.resolve.

classes.name: traceFlow
classes.signature: function traceFlow(seed, adjacency, hubIds, maxDepth = 6, ctx = null, maxNodes = Infinity)
classes.description_zh: 从种子沿 uses 邻接做前向 BFS，并经 dispatch 索引向接口实现者扇出，hub 作叶子，产出流程的节点与边。
classes.description_en: Forward-BFS from a seed over uses adjacency with dispatch fan-out to interface implementors, hubs as leaves, yielding a flow's nodes and edges.

classes.name: buildFlows
classes.signature: function buildFlows(seeds, declarations, edges, hubIds, maxDepth = 6, opts = {})

classes.name: buildDispatchFlows
classes.signature: function buildDispatchFlows(declarations, dispatchIndex, edges, hubIds, opts = {})

layers.name: Graph & Core Model
layers.summary: Dependency-graph construction, importance scoring, core selection, display names, JSON shaping, git/version provenance, architecture scoring.

classes.name: round3
classes.description_zh: 复刻 Python round 的银行家舍入，保证移植实现与评分输出逐字节一致。
classes.description_en: Replicates Python's banker's rounding so the ported implementations and the score output stay byte-identical.

classes.name: resolve
classes.signature: function resolve(raw, byQname, byShort, srcDecl = null)

classes.name: toJsonShape
classes.signature: function toJsonShape(declarations, edges, layers, projectMeta, flows = null)

classes.name: isGitRepo
classes.description_zh: 判断给定根目录是否位于 git 工作区内。
classes.description_en: Tests whether the given root sits inside a git work-tree.

classes.name: assignDisplayNames
classes.description_zh: 当裸符号名跨模块冲突时，确定性地计算全局唯一的展示标签（_display_name）；唯一名保持原样。
classes.description_en: Deterministically computes a globally-unique display label (_display_name) only when a bare symbol name collides across modules; unique names keep their bare label.

classes.name: scoreLayering
classes.description_zh: 分层维度评分：惩罚未分类声明、巨层、空层与向上的跨层 uses 依赖。
classes.description_en: Scores the layering dimension: penalizes uncategorized declarations, monolayers, empty layers, and upward cross-layer uses edges.

classes.name: scoreDependencies
classes.description_zh: 依赖维度评分：Tarjan SCC 找环、传递可达密度、度集中度与导入解析覆盖率。
classes.description_en: Scores the dependency dimension: Tarjan-SCC cycles, transitive reach density, degree concentration, and import-resolution coverage.

classes.name: scoreHygiene
classes.description_zh: 卫生维度评分：惩罚解析失败、vendored 泛滥告警、孤立声明与超大单元。
classes.description_en: Scores the hygiene dimension: parse failures, vendored-flooding advisories, isolated declarations, and oversized units.

classes.name: computeScore
classes.description_zh: 架构评分的确定性基线：total = round(难度 D × 执行质量 E)，输出逐字节稳定的评分对象。
classes.description_en: The deterministic arch-score baseline: total = round(difficulty D × execution E), yielding a byte-stable score object.

layers.name: Architecture & Layering
layers.summary: Template detection/loading, layer assignment, fit scoring, skip-dirs, vendored-flooding advisory, YAML parsing.

classes.name: loadConfig
classes.description_zh: 三级配置解析：优先 Phase 0 的 architecture.yml，其次信号检测的模板，最后内置兜底分层。
classes.description_en: Three-tier config resolution: the Phase-0 architecture.yml first, then the signal-detected template, then the embedded fallback layers.

classes.name: assignLayer
classes.description_zh: 把声明分配到层：路径段与命名空间段反转后从右往左匹配 path_segments，再回退到名称后缀。
classes.description_en: Assigns a declaration to a layer: reversed path+namespace segments matched right-to-left against path_segments, falling back to name suffixes.

classes.name: loadSkipDirs
classes.description_zh: 合并默认跳过目录、CLI 附加项与项目 .code-map/skip-dirs.txt（支持 `-dir` 行取消跳过）。
classes.description_en: Merges default skip dirs, CLI extras, and the project's .code-map/skip-dirs.txt (with `-dir` un-skip lines).

classes.name: loadTemplates
classes.description_zh: 从插件 templates/ 目录读取并解析全部内置架构模板 YAML。
classes.description_en: Loads and parses every bundled architecture-template YAML from the plugin's templates/ directory.

classes.name: detectTemplate
classes.description_zh: 基于文件/依赖/路径信号给 13 个架构模板打分，选出最契合项目的模板及其证据。
classes.description_en: Scores the 13 architecture templates against file/dependency/path signals and picks the best-fitting one with its evidence.

classes.name: detectVendoredDirs
classes.description_zh: 找出声明数大且绝大多数包不属于项目自身根的顶层目录，产出 vendored 泛滥告警。
classes.description_en: Flags top-level dirs that are large and dominated by foreign package roots, emitting vendored-flooding advisories.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: 面向 code-map 自有文件的最小 YAML 解析器：块映射/序列、流集合、引号标量与注释。
classes.description_en: A minimal YAML parser for code-map's own files: block mappings/sequences, flow collections, quoted scalars, and comments.

classes.name: parseSequence
classes.description_zh: 解析 YAML 块序列（- item），支持嵌套块与内联映射项。
classes.description_en: Parses a YAML block sequence (- item), handling nested blocks and inline mapping items.

classes.name: parseMapping
classes.description_zh: 解析 YAML 块映射（key: value），并递归处理更深缩进的嵌套块。
classes.description_en: Parses a YAML block mapping (key: value), recursing into more-indented nested blocks.

classes.name: parseScalar
classes.description_zh: 将标量文本解析为字符串/整数/浮点/布尔/null 或流式集合。
classes.description_en: Parses a scalar token into a string/int/float/bool/null or a flow collection.

layers.name: Language Parsing
layers.summary: WASM grammar loading, the tree-sitter wrapper, the 13 per-language declaration extractors, and TS/JS import resolution.

classes.name: unmarshalCaptures
classes.signature: function unmarshalCaptures(query, tree, address, patternIndex, result)

classes.name: parseIsPredicate
classes.signature: function parseIsPredicate(steps, index, operator, assertedProperties, refutedProperties)

classes.name: parsePattern
classes.signature: function parsePattern(index, stepType, stepValueId, captureNames, stringValues, steps, textPredicates, predicates, setProperties, assertedProperties, refutedProperties)

classes.name: resolveGrammarWasm
classes.description_zh: 解析语言对应的 grammar wasm 路径：内置语法直接返回仓库路径，远程语法首次按 sha256 校验下载并缓存。
classes.description_en: Resolves a language's grammar wasm path: bundled grammars return a repo path; remote ones are fetched once, sha256-verified, and cached.

classes.name: init
classes.description_zh: 一次性初始化 web-tree-sitter 运行时并定位内置 wasm。
classes.description_en: One-time initialization of the web-tree-sitter runtime, locating the bundled wasm.

classes.name: loadLanguage
classes.description_zh: 按清单名加载并缓存一个 tree-sitter Language（必要时触发 grammar 下载）。
classes.description_en: Loads and caches a tree-sitter Language by manifest name, triggering a grammar fetch when needed.

classes.name: makeQuery
classes.description_zh: 用给定语法编译一个 tree-sitter 查询。
classes.description_en: Compiles a tree-sitter query against the given grammar.

classes.name: textOf
classes.description_zh: 返回 tree-sitter 节点的源码文本（web-tree-sitter 已正确解码为 JS 字符串）。
classes.description_en: Returns a tree-sitter node's source text (correctly decoded by web-tree-sitter).

classes.name: orderedIdentifiers
classes.description_zh: 按文档顺序收集节点下的标识符叶子，用于从宏调用参数中恢复真实函数名。
classes.description_en: Collects identifier-like leaves under a node in document order, used to recover real function names hidden inside macro-call arguments.

classes.name: macroFnFromDef
classes.description_zh: 恢复被 tree-sitter 解析为 macro_type_specifier 的函数式宏定义（变体 A），取第二个标识符作为函数名。
classes.description_en: Recovers a function-style macro definition parsed as a macro_type_specifier (variant A), taking the second identifier as the function name.

classes.name: macroFnFromCall
classes.description_zh: 识别被解析为裸宏调用 + 代码块的函数式宏定义（FreeRTOS 风格），恢复其真实函数名与函数体。
classes.description_en: Recovers a function-style-macro definition parsed as a bare macro call followed by a block (FreeRTOS-style), extracting the real function name and body.

classes.name: tailName
classes.description_zh: 取（可能带点号的）引用节点的末段标识符名，作为调用图解析的目标短名。
classes.description_en: Returns the trailing identifier of a (possibly dotted) reference node — the short name used to resolve call-graph targets.

classes.name: hasErrorIn
classes.description_zh: 递归判断节点子树是否含 ERROR/MISSING 节点，用于把解析失败的声明降级为低置信度。
classes.description_en: Recursively tests whether a node subtree contains any ERROR/MISSING node — used to down-grade unparseable declarations to low confidence.

classes.name: locOf
classes.description_zh: 计算节点跨越的源码行数（1 基、闭区间）。
classes.description_en: Computes the number of source lines a node spans (1-indexed, inclusive).

classes.name: signatureOf
classes.description_zh: 提取函数节点到其函数体之前的签名头文本，并折叠空白。
classes.description_en: Extracts a function node's signature header (up to its body) with whitespace collapsed.

classes.name: countMethods
classes.description_zh: 统计类节点体内直接定义的方法数量，作为类规模的度量信号。
classes.description_en: Counts the method definitions directly inside a class node's body — a size signal for the class.

classes.name: Declaration
classes.description_zh: 声明的统一数据结构工厂（name/namespace/kind/path/refs/supertypes…），所有语言提取器的共同输出形态。
classes.description_en: Factory for the uniform Declaration record (name/namespace/kind/path/refs/supertypes…) — the common shape every language extractor emits.

classes.name: qualifiedName
classes.description_zh: 由 namespace 与 name 拼出声明的全限定 id，是全管线节点的主键。
classes.description_en: Builds a declaration's fully-qualified id from namespace + name — the primary key for every node in the pipeline.

classes.name: ImportSpec
classes.signature: function ImportSpec(raw, qualified = null, alias = null, bindings = [])
classes.description_zh: 导入语句的数据结构：原始字符串、限定名、别名与命名绑定列表（local/imported 对）。
classes.description_en: Record for an import statement: raw string, qualified name, alias, and its named bindings (local/imported pairs).

classes.name: ReexportSpec
classes.signature: function ReexportSpec(source, names = [], star = false, alias = null)
classes.description_zh: 重导出语句的数据结构：来源模块、命名映射与 star/别名标记，供桶文件展开使用。
classes.description_en: Record for a re-export statement — source module, name mappings, and star/alias markers — feeding barrel expansion.

classes.name: ParseResult
classes.description_zh: 单文件解析结果的容器：声明、导入、跳过项与重导出列表。
classes.description_en: Container for a single file's parse result: declarations, imports, skipped entries, and re-exports.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: 用 tree-sitter-c 解析 C 源码，提取函数、结构体/联合体与函数式宏定义及其调用关系。
classes.description_en: Parses C with tree-sitter-c, extracting functions, structs/unions, and function-style macro definitions with their call edges.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: 用 tree-sitter-cpp 解析 C++ 源码，提取类、结构体、函数与命名空间成员及其继承/调用关系。
classes.description_en: Parses C++ with tree-sitter-cpp, extracting classes, structs, functions, and namespace members with their inheritance/call edges.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: 用 tree-sitter-c-sharp 解析 C# 源码，提取类、接口、结构体、记录与枚举。
classes.description_en: Parses C# with tree-sitter-c-sharp, extracting classes, interfaces, structs, records, and enums.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: 用 dart 语法解析 Dart 源码，提取类、mixin、枚举与顶层函数。
classes.description_en: Parses Dart with the dart grammar, extracting classes, mixins, enums, and top-level functions.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: 用 tree-sitter-go 解析 Go 源码，提取类型（struct/interface）、函数与带接收者的方法。
classes.description_en: Parses Go with tree-sitter-go, extracting types (struct/interface), functions, and receiver methods.

classes.name: extractorFor
classes.description_zh: 按文件扩展名查注册表并惰性加载对应的语言提取器模块。
classes.description_en: Looks up the registry by file extension and lazily loads the matching language-extractor module.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: 用 tree-sitter-java 解析 Java 源码，提取类、接口、枚举与记录及其继承关系。
classes.description_en: Parses Java with tree-sitter-java, extracting classes, interfaces, enums, and records with their inheritance edges.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: 用 tree-sitter-kotlin 解析 Kotlin 源码，提取类、接口、对象与函数（含 @Composable 标注）。
classes.description_en: Parses Kotlin with tree-sitter-kotlin, extracting classes, interfaces, objects, and functions (including @Composable-annotated ones).

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: 用 tree-sitter-lua 解析 Lua 源码，提取函数及其调用关系。
classes.description_en: Parses Lua with tree-sitter-lua, extracting functions and their call edges.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: 用 tree-sitter-objc 解析 Objective-C 源码，提取类、协议、类别与方法。
classes.description_en: Parses Objective-C with tree-sitter-objc, extracting classes, protocols, categories, and methods.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: 用 tree-sitter-python 解析 Python 源码，提取类与函数并依命名约定推断可见性。
classes.description_en: Parses Python with tree-sitter-python, extracting classes and functions and inferring visibility from naming conventions.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: 用 tree-sitter-rust 解析 Rust 源码，提取 struct、enum、trait、impl 与函数及其 trait 实现关系。
classes.description_en: Parses Rust with tree-sitter-rust, extracting structs, enums, traits, impls, and functions with their trait-impl edges.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: 用 tree-sitter-swift 解析 Swift 源码，提取类、结构体、协议、枚举、扩展与函数。
classes.description_en: Parses Swift with tree-sitter-swift, extracting classes, structs, protocols, enums, extensions, and functions.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: 用 tree-sitter-typescript 解析 TS/JS，提取类、接口、函数、类型别名与枚举，并捕获导入绑定与重导出供解析子阶段使用（import 仅作用域、不直接成边）。
classes.description_en: Parses TS/JS with tree-sitter-typescript, extracting classes, interfaces, functions, type aliases, and enums, and capturing import bindings and re-exports for the resolution sub-phase (imports are scope, not edges).

classes.name: resolveProject
classes.description_zh: 语言无关的解析编排器：按声明语言分发到对应解析器（目前为 TS/JS）；无解析器的语言保持短名引用。
classes.description_en: Language-agnostic resolution orchestrator: dispatches declarations to a per-language resolver (TS/JS today); languages without one keep short-name refs.

classes.name: resolveSpecifier
classes.description_zh: 把模块说明符解析为项目文件：相对路径 → tsconfig paths 别名 → baseUrl → 外部依赖，并探测扩展名与目录 index。
classes.description_en: Resolves a module specifier to a project file — relative → tsconfig paths alias → baseUrl → external — probing extensions and directory indexes.

classes.name: loadTsconfig
classes.description_zh: 读取 tsconfig/jsconfig 的 baseUrl 与 paths（容忍 JSONC、跟随相对 extends），供模块解析使用。
classes.description_en: Reads baseUrl and paths from tsconfig/jsconfig (JSONC-tolerant, following relative extends) for module resolution.

classes.name: ownExportsByFile
classes.description_zh: 为每个文件建立其自有公开声明的导出名 → 限定名映射。
classes.description_en: Builds each file's map of its own public declarations: export name → qualified name.

classes.name: buildExportMaps
classes.description_zh: 在自有导出之上做传递性桶文件（re-export）展开，得到每文件的完整导出表；带记忆化与环保护。
classes.description_en: Expands transitive barrel re-exports on top of own exports into each file's full export map; memoized and cycle-guarded.

classes.name: resolveOneRef
classes.signature: function resolveOneRef(short, file, ctx, scopes, exportMaps, ownExports, sameFileNames)

classes.name: resolveTs
classes.description_zh: TS/JS 引用解析主流程：基于每文件导入作用域把短名引用改写为高置信限定名边，失败项进入审计列表。
classes.description_en: The TS/JS resolution pass: rewrites short-name refs into high-confidence qualified-name edges via per-file import scope, auditing the misses.

layers.name: Viewer Rendering & UI
layers.summary: Canvas/SVG rendering, layer & flow layout, pan/zoom/selection, UI controls, and PNG export.

classes.name: createSelection
classes.description_zh: 轻量选中通路：不走全量重渲染，只切换高亮类并重绘选中节点的边（流程视图高亮贯穿整条链）。
classes.description_en: The lightweight selection path: skips full re-render, toggling highlight classes and redrawing only the selected node's edges (the whole chain in flow view).

classes.name: nodeWidth
classes.description_zh: 由标签长度（优先 display_name）计算节点盒宽度，并夹在布局的最小/最大宽之间。
classes.description_en: Computes a node box's width from its label length (display_name first), clamped to the layout's min/max width.

classes.name: flowEdgeClass
classes.signature: function flowEdgeClass(kind, { active = false, dimmed = false } = {})

classes.name: langColor
classes.description_zh: 语言 → CSS 颜色变量的映射，驱动节点的语言色条，未知语言回退默认色。
classes.description_en: Maps a language to its CSS color variable for the node's language stripe, falling back to a default.

classes.name: makeNodeEl
classes.description_zh: 构建分层与流程两种视图共用的单个 SVG 节点元素（双矩形 + 语言色条 + 截断标签 + 交互监听）。
classes.description_en: Builds the shared SVG node element used by both the layer and flow renderers (double-rect + language stripe + truncated label + interaction listeners).

classes.name: appendNode
classes.signature: function appendNode(st, group, n, ctx, decorateNode)

classes.name: renderApp
classes.description_zh: 渲染生命周期的统一入口：查出当前激活的视图定义（分层带 / 流程图）并交由 renderScene 绘制。
classes.description_en: The unified render entry: looks up the active ViewDef (layer bands / flow DAG) and hands off to renderScene to draw it.

classes.name: formatBuildInfo
classes.description_zh: 把 project 元数据格式化为顶栏构建徽章（分支 · 短哈希 · 时间 · 架构评分）与含评分明细的双语悬浮提示。
classes.description_en: Formats project metadata into the topbar badge (branch · short-hash · time · arch score) and a tooltip with the bilingual score breakdown.

classes.name: applyCommitChrome
classes.description_zh: 在 layer 模式且存在 git 元数据时，显示提交历史侧栏的入口标签。
classes.description_en: Shows the commit-history sidebar entry tab when in layer mode and git metadata is present.

classes.name: closeCommitSidebar
classes.description_zh: 收起提交历史侧栏、清除提交高亮并恢复画布宽度。
classes.description_en: Collapses the commit-history sidebar, clears the commit highlight, and restores the canvas width.

classes.name: populateCommitList
classes.description_zh: 渲染左侧提交历史列表，并把选中的提交映射为应高亮的节点集合。
classes.description_en: Renders the left commit-history list and maps the selected commit to the set of nodes to highlight.

classes.name: initControls
classes.description_zh: 装配顶栏全部控件（core/all、分层/流程、主题、字号、语言）与流程侧栏，应用持久化设置并初始化布局。
classes.description_en: Wires every topbar control (core/all, layer/flow, theme, font, language) and the flow sidebar, applying persisted settings and initializing the layout.

classes.name: createDetail
classes.description_zh: 构建右侧详情面板：声明的标题/签名、标签、路径深链、双语描述与依赖/被依赖边列表。
classes.description_en: Builds the right-hand detail panel: a declaration's title/signature, tags, path deep-link, bilingual description, and depends-on / depended-by edge lists.

classes.name: renderLangStats
classes.description_zh: 渲染详情面板底部的各语言声明数量统计（按降序排列）。
classes.description_en: Renders the detail-panel footer with per-language declaration counts, sorted descending.

layers.name: Viewer Data & State
layers.summary: Loads code-map.json in the browser, builds the view model, and holds selection / theme / language state.

classes.name: t
classes.description_zh: 按 key 与语言从 UI 字典中查出译文字符串。
classes.description_en: Looks up a UI string from the dictionary by key and language.

classes.name: applyI18nStatic
classes.description_zh: 把根节点下所有 data-i18n 文本与标题翻译为当前语言，并设置文档的语言属性。
classes.description_en: Translates every data-i18n text and title under a root into the active language and sets the document lang attribute.

classes.name: setState
classes.description_zh: 合并补丁到全局 state，并按帧（requestAnimationFrame）合并触发一次重渲染通知。
classes.description_en: Merges a patch into the global state and schedules one rAF-coalesced re-render notification per frame.

classes.name: escapeHtml
classes.description_zh: 转义字符串中的 HTML 敏感字符，供安全插入到 HTML 文本中。
classes.description_en: Escapes HTML-sensitive characters in a string for safe interpolation into HTML text.

classes.name: loadGitHistory
classes.description_zh: 懒加载构建时生成的 git-history.json 侧车一次并缓存到 state，供提交历史侧栏渲染。
classes.description_en: Lazily fetches the build-time git-history.json sidecar once and caches it on state for the commit-history sidebar.

classes.name: buildFlowIndex
classes.description_zh: 构建 id→flow 索引：优先使用模型自带 flows，否则按入口点在客户端合成，并选出默认激活的流程。
classes.description_en: Builds the id→flow index, using the model's own flows or synthesizing them client-side per entry point, and picks the default active flow.

flows.name: 构建流水线 · Build Pipeline
flows.description: code-map 的端到端构建流程：扫描源码、逐语言提取声明、解析 TS/JS 导入，再建图、分层、流程发现并产出 raw_structure.json。 · code-map's end-to-end build: scan sources, extract declarations per language, resolve TS/JS imports, then build the graph, assign layers, discover flows, and emit raw_structure.json.

flows.name: 声明提取 · Declaration Extraction
flows.description: 单个语言提取器的工作流（以 TypeScript 为代表）：加载 grammar、tree-sitter 解析，再借助 base/_common 工具把语法树转为统一的 Declaration 列表。 · How one language extractor works (TypeScript shown): load the grammar, parse with tree-sitter, then turn the syntax tree into uniform Declarations via the base/_common helpers.

flows.name: C 宏函数恢复 · C Macro-Function Recovery
flows.description: C 提取器的边界处理：除常规函数/结构体外，额外恢复被 tree-sitter 解析为宏调用的函数式宏定义（FreeRTOS 的 portTASK_FUNCTION 风格）。 · The C extractor's edge-case handling: beyond ordinary functions/structs, it recovers function-style macro definitions that tree-sitter parses as macro calls (FreeRTOS's portTASK_FUNCTION style).

flows.name: 架构评分 · Architecture Scoring
flows.description: `code-map score` 的评分流程：对最终地图计算分层/依赖/卫生三维度的确定性罚分，合成 D×E 总分并施加有界的 AI 调整。 · The `code-map score` pass: computes deterministic layering/dependency/hygiene penalties over the final map, assembles the D×E total, and applies the bounded AI adjustment.

flows.name: 视图渲染 · Viewer Rendering
flows.description: viewer 的渲染入口：根据当前激活的视图定义（分层带或流程图）查表分发，交由 renderScene 绘制场景。 · The viewer's render entry: dispatches on the active ViewDef (layer bands or flow DAG) and hands off to renderScene to draw the scene.
